history.content:
مرحباً! 👋 أنا مساعدك في Godot Engine و GDScript

كيف يمكنني مساعدتك اليوم؟ 🎮

يمكنني:
- 🆕 إنشاء ألعاب كاملة
- ✏️ تعديل ملفات موجودة
- 🐛 إصلاح الأخطاء
- 💡 شرح الكود

اكتب ما تريد! 😊

هل يمكنك انشاء لعبة كاملة بسيطة في محرك جودوت ويمكنك الانشاء والتعديل في ملفات يعني سوي مجلد وبداخله ملفات.
بحيث انا فقط بس العب

بالتأكيد! 🎮

أي نوع لعبة تريد؟

1️⃣ كسر الطوب (Breakout)
2️⃣ الثعبان (Snake)
3️⃣ تجنب العوائق (Dodge)
4️⃣ منصات (Platformer)
5️⃣ بينغ (Pong)

اختر رقم أو اكتب فكرتك! 😊

{"action":"create","path":"Snake/main.gd","content":"extends Node2D

const CELL_SIZE = 40
const GRID_WIDTH = 20
const GRID_HEIGHT = 15

var snake_body = []
var direction = Vector2(1, 0)
var next_direction = Vector2(1, 0)
var score = 0
var game_over = false
var game_started = false

onready var timer = $Timer
onready var score_label = $ScoreLabel
onready var game_over_label = $GameOverLabel
onready var food_node = $Food
onready var snake_node = $Snake

func _ready():
	score_label.add_font_override("font", load("res://Snake/font.tres") if ResourceLoader.exists("res://Snake/font.tres") else null)
	start_game()

func start_game():
	score = 0
	game_over = false
	direction = Vector2(1, 0)
	next_direction = Vector2(1, 0)
	snake_body.clear()
	snake_body.append(Vector2(5, 7))
	snake_body.append(Vector2(4, 7))
	snake_body.append(Vector2(3, 7))
	score_label.text = "Score: 0"
	game_over_label.text = "🐍 SNAKE\nاضغط اي زر للبدء"
	food_node.spawn_food(snake_body)
	timer.connect("timeout", self, "_on_Timer_timeout")
	update()

func _input(event):
	if event is InputEventKey and event.pressed:
		if game_over:
			start_game()
			return
		if not game_started:
			game_started = true
			game_over_label.text = ""
			timer.start()
		match event.scancode:
			KEY_UP, KEY_W:
				if direction != Vector2(0, 1):
					next_direction = Vector2(0, -1)
			KEY_DOWN, KEY_S:
				if direction != Vector2(0, -1):
					next_direction = Vector2(0, 1)
			KEY_LEFT, KEY_A:
				if direction != Vector2(1, 0):
					next_direction = Vector2(-1, 0)
			KEY_RIGHT, KEY_D:
				if direction != Vector2(-1, 0):
					next_direction = Vector2(1, 0)

func _on_Timer_timeout():
	if game_over:
		return
	direction = next_direction
	var new_head = snake_body[0] + direction
	if new_head.x < 0 or new_head.x >= GRID_WIDTH or new_head.y < 0 or new_head.y >= GRID_HEIGHT:
		end_game()
		return
	for segment in snake_body:
		if new_head == segment:
			end_game()
			return
	snake_body.push_front(new_head)
	if new_head == food_node.food_pos:
		score += 10
		score_label.text = "Score: " + str(score)
		food_node.spawn_food(snake_body)
	else:
		snake_body.pop_back()
	update()

func end_game():
	game_over = true
	game_started = false
	timer.stop()
	game_over_label.text = "GAME OVER\nScore: " + str(score) + "\nاضغط اي زر للعب مجدداً"
	update()

func _draw():
	# Draw grid
	for x in range(GRID_WIDTH):
		for y in range(GRID_HEIGHT):
			draw_rect(Rect2(x * CELL_SIZE + 1, y * CELL_SIZE + 1, CELL_SIZE - 2, CELL_SIZE - 2), Color(0.15, 0.15, 0.15))
	# Draw food
	if food_node:
		var fp = food_node.food_pos
		draw_rect(Rect2(fp.x * CELL_SIZE + 4, fp.y * CELL_SIZE + 4, CELL_SIZE - 8, CELL_SIZE - 8), Color(1, 0.2, 0.2))
		draw_circle(Vector2(fp.x * CELL_SIZE + CELL_SIZE / 2, fp.y * CELL_SIZE + CELL_SIZE / 2), CELL_SIZE / 2 - 6, Color(1, 0.4, 0.4))
	# Draw snake
	for i in range(snake_body.size()):
		var seg = snake_body[i]
		var color = Color(0.2, 0.9, 0.2) if i == 0 else Color(0.1, 0.7, 0.1)
		if game_over:
			color = Color(0.6, 0.6, 0.6)
		draw_rect(Rect2(seg.x * CELL_SIZE + 2, seg.y * CELL_SIZE + 2, CELL_SIZE - 4, CELL_SIZE - 4), color)
		if i == 0:
			# Eyes
			var eye_offset1 = Vector2(0, 0)
			var eye_offset2 = Vector2(0, 0)
			if direction == Vector2(1, 0):
				eye_offset1 = Vector2(CELL_SIZE - 12, 8)
				eye_offset2 = Vector2(CELL_SIZE - 12, CELL_SIZE - 14)
			elif direction == Vector2(-1, 0):
				eye_offset1 = Vector2(6, 8)
				eye_offset2 = Vector2(6, CELL_SIZE - 14)
			elif direction == Vector2(0, -1):
				eye_offset1 = Vector2(8, 6)
				eye_offset2 = Vector2(CELL_SIZE - 14, 6)
			elif direction == Vector2(0, 1):
				eye_offset1 = Vector2(8, CELL_SIZE - 12)
				eye_offset2 = Vector2(CELL_SIZE - 14, CELL_SIZE - 12)
			draw_circle(Vector2(seg.x * CELL_SIZE, seg.y * CELL_SIZE) + eye_offset1 + Vector2(2,2), 4, Color(1,1,1))
			draw_circle(Vector2(seg.x * CELL_SIZE, seg.y * CELL_SIZE) + eye_offset2 + Vector2(2,2), 4, Color(1,1,1))
			draw_circle(Vector2(seg.x * CELL_SIZE, seg.y * CELL_SIZE) + eye_offset1 + Vector2(3,3), 2, Color(0,0,0))
			draw_circle(Vector2(seg.x * CELL_SIZE, seg.y * CELL_SIZE) + eye_offset2 + Vector2(3,3), 2, Color(0,0,0))
"}

{"action":"create","path":"Snake/food.gd","content":"extends Node2D

const GRID_WIDTH = 20
const GRID_HEIGHT = 15

var food_pos = Vector2(10, 7)

func spawn_food(snake_body):
	var empty_cells = []
	for x in range(GRID_WIDTH):
		for y in range(GRID_HEIGHT):
			var pos = Vector2(x, y)
			if not snake_body.has(pos):
				empty_cells.append(pos)
	if empty_cells.size() > 0:
		food_pos = empty_cells[randi() % empty_cells.size()]
"}

{"action":"create","path":"Snake/project.godot","content":"[application]

config/name="Snake Game"
run/main_scene="res://Snake/main.tscn"
config/icon="res://icon.png"

window/size/height=600

quality/driver/driver_name="GLES2"
"}
